title.en: Talent in front of the mirror.

content.en:
Talent in front of the mirror.

Ye Tian put his hands on it, only to see the light of the talent mirror flickering, and soon a number appeared on it.

And as soon as this number appeared, everyone was stunned, and the Lord of Blood Separation was also dumbfounded, and he was stunned for a moment, and did not announce Ye Tian's talent value.

It took him a moment to come to his senses.

"You test again!"

The Lord of Blood said.

He wondered if there was a mistake with the talent mirror, otherwise how could there be such an outrageous talent value!

"No problem!"

Ye Tian tested it again.

Soon, the talent mirror came out with a number again, exactly the same as the previous number.

This was true for both tests, and he had to believe it.

Moreover, he also knew that it was unlikely that a perfect treasure like the Talent Mirror could go wrong.

"Talent stats 106988!"

The Lord of Blood Separation announced.

Everyone was stunned, more than 100,000 talent points!

"This is impossible, the talent value of other Ten Realm-level controllers is only a few hundred, and only a very few can break a thousand, and his talent value exceeds 100,000, how is this possible?"

A Ten Realm-level controller who had not passed the assessment said in confusion.

The Lord of Blood Separation said: "The talent mirror is a perfect treasure, you can't go wrong, the next ......"

In fact, the Lord of Blood Separation already had some speculation in his mind.

According to his understanding of the talent mirror, if he has a perfect-level ancestral endowment, the talent value can directly exceed 10,000, and if there is one more perfect-level ancestral endowment, the talent value can increase by 10,000 more.

And Ye Tian has more than 100,000 talent values, which means that Ye Tian has more than a few perfect-level ancestral endowments, plus Ye Tian himself has a large number of control-level ancestral endowments, which can reach 100,000 talent values.

However, a Ten Realm-level controller has several perfect-level ancestral endowments on him, which is too demonic!

As far as he knew, since the Eternal Ruins jumped to the world like this, there were indeed many special beings with perfect-level ancestral endowments, but at most they had two or three perfect-level ancestral endowments.

In short, it was the first time he had encountered a cultivator who had surpassed 100,000 talent values.

"Ye Tian can kill the ink demon with one blow, his own strength is very terrifying, maybe his talent value has really reached such a level. "

The Lord of Bloodshed's Secret Path.

Immediately, he reported the situation to the upper echelons of the Pathless Tower.

Soon, the news came.

"Recruit Ye Tian directly, no need to continue the test!"

This is a teleportation from the upper echelons of the Pathless Tower.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Blood Separation arranged the other Ten Realm-level controllers to go to the next round of assessments, and an avatar left here with Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian, you don't have to participate in the follow-up assessment, now the Wudao Tower officially invites you to join. "

The Lord of Blood said.

"Don't you have to take the test?"

Ye Tian was naturally pleased, and immediately nodded, agreeing to join the Wudao Tower.

The incarnation of the Lord of Blood Separation immediately took Ye Tian to the Daoless Tower.

The Pathless Tower is still relatively far away from the Distanceless City, and it is located in an independent time and space.

Airplanes!!!

Space-time warp.

Soon, Ye Tian followed the Lord of Blood Separation to an independent time and space, where he saw towering giant towers, countless giant towers standing in this time and space.

The Lord of Blood Separation pointed here and said, "This is the headquarters of the Daoless Tower, the Land of the Daoless! The Land of the Daoless has many cultivation towers, and each of them is a branch of the true Daoless Tower, with many special effects, which are very suitable for cultivation. "

"What level of weapon is the Pathless Tower?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Super Perfect Treasure!"

The Lord of Blood Separation introduced.

Ye Tian knew that the Perfect Treasure was divided into low, medium, high, and super, and the Super Perfect Treasure was undoubtedly the most powerful Perfect Treasure.

However, he only knew that the Perfect Treasure was powerful, but he couldn't reach it at the moment.

After all, the Perfect Treasure is almost always in the hands of the Perfect Master.

"Let's go, I'll take you to Tower Six of the Daoless Tower, which is a place for new members to go through the formalities of joining the Daoless Tower. After completing the process, you can receive a branch pagoda and place it in the place of no path as your own place of cultivation. As long as the main body stays in the land of no way, even those incomparably powerful perfect controllers will not be able to kill you, and no means will work. This is also the reason why countless cultivators want to join the Daoless Pagoda. Of course, the very few perfect controllers should not be provoked, otherwise the power of the Wudao Tower will not be blessed. The Lord of Blood said.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Blood Separation came to Tower No. 6.

Here, the Lord of Blood Separation asked Ye Tian to go through the formalities of joining the Daoless Tower.

Subsequently, Ye Tian obtained a Daoless Tower Branch.

Although it is only a sub-tower, its grade is second only to the perfect treasure.

The Daoless Pagoda contains a lot of time and space, which can allow perfect-level controllers to practice moves, and if you practice here, the speed of absorbing energy will be very fast, and it also has the effect of improving your understanding.

Other than that.

The Pathless Tower's sub-towers are also connected to the Pathless Tower's body, and you can look through the many secret art inheritances stored in the Pathless Tower, etc.

And Ye Tian joined the Wudao Tower, and he also had a lot of treatment at the beginning.

Moreover, the Wudao Tower gave Ye Tian the highest treatment this time.

For example, some resources that can improve the body of control and will, these resources are good things that can hardly be found in the Origin Realm Sea, but they are directly given here as rewards for new members.

For Ye Tian, there is another advantage of joining the Wudao Tower, that is, he can comprehend the Perfect Treasure - Perfect Dao Mountain.

Perfect Dao Mountain is a perfect treasure in the form of a mountain, and it ranks among the ranks of medium perfect treasures.

Staying on the Perfect Dao Mountain to comprehend the changes of the cultivation path can speed up the speed of enlightenment, for example, many practitioners in the Daoless Pagoda can master a billion changes of a Dao, and it is by relying on the effect of the Perfect Dao Mountain.

Of course, Ye Tian can only practice and comprehend the 100,000 Eternal Era for free in Perfect Dao Mountain, and after exceeding the 100,000 Eternal Era, he needs a certain degree of contribution before he can continue to comprehend.

And the contribution needs to do tasks, which is also the situation of every force, for example, it is impossible for a force to selflessly donate resources without doing anything.

Just give some benefits at the beginning, and you have to help the forces do things in the later stage to get more resources.

"One hundred thousand eternal eras, it is also a long time, first send a will clone to the Perfect Dao Mountain to practice, and then copy the body here to refine resources, improve the body of control and will. "

Ye Tian planned.
